summary: While this role offers an exceptionally predictable Monday-through-Friday schedule and excellent work-life boundaries, it is a poor fit for your specific profile. The position requires a highly analytical, detective-like thinking style relying heavily on clinical numeracy and logical deduction, which directly conflicts with your preference for procedural work. Furthermore, the daily reality includes high stress from regulatory liability, intense production quotas, and adversarial interactions with physicians. Because the fundamental cognitive demands misalign with your strengths and introduce significant daily stress, this role should be avoided despite its ideal hours.
